title: Beef's Crafting Mat
description: A smaller crafting table, for interior artists!
body:
# Beef's Crafting Mat
![Crafting Mat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f90fbb6c555b57e0d7ce59041c636d09c311f86.png)
## About
It's a crafting mat! Super small, super modular!

## Recipe
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a249ab3b8436f717d18d6d613eacd752830ec7b4.png)

Easy to craft, Easy to use!

## Modpacks
You may use this mod in your modpack as long as you credit.

## Contact Me
Please reach out to me on The Fabric Project Discord if you have any requests for features or want to report bugs. My tag is @beefymuscle.

Big thanks to The Fabric Project Discord. They are so kind to amateur developers like myself.

Philippians 4:13 I can do all things through Christ who strengthens me.
